CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Contract_Fee_Type__c, "Weekly Fee"), ( CASE( Pro_Rate_Part_Period_Fees__c, "Yes", CEILING(((TR1__End_Date__c - TR1__Start_Date__c) + 1) / 7), ROUND(((TR1__End_Date__c - TR1__Start_Date__c) + 1) / 7, 2) ) ), IF( ISPICKVAL(Contract_Fee_Type__c, "Monthly Fee"), ( CASE( Pro_Rate_Part_Period_Fees__c, "Yes", CEILING((TR1__End_Date__c - TR1__Start_Date__c )/30.4375 + (MONTH(TR1__End_Date__c) - MONTH( TR1__Start_Date__c))/12.0), ROUND((TR1__End_Date__c - TR1__Start_Date__c )/30.4375 + (MONTH(TR1__End_Date__c) - MONTH( TR1__Start_Date__c))/12.0, 2) ) ), 0.00 ) )
CustomField.label: Number of Contract Fees
